data: 3 preset weighted graphs: simple_4 (4 nodes/4 edges), medium_6 (6 nodes), large_8 (8 nodes); same as baseline
method: QAOA (p=2 layers, 5 restarts, COBYLA optimizer) with cqlib StatevectorSimulator
optimal_rate: 3/3 (100%) QAOA found exact optimum on all graphs
qubo_modeling: MaxCut as QUBO: maximize sum of crossing-edge weights; normalized to [-1,1]
limitations: Simulator-only results (cqlib StatevectorSimulator), NOT real quantum hardware. All 3 preset graphs solved to optimum (gap 0%) — MaxCut on these small graphs is favorable for QAOA; performance on denser/larger graphs may differ. No shot noise (statevector, not sampling).
